nasb.text: He made cities for himself and acquired flocks and herds in abundance, for God had given him very great wealth.

esv.text: He likewise provided cities for himself, and flocks and herds in abundance, for God had given him very great possessions.

cnv.text: 他又為自己建造城鎮，並且擁有大批牛羊牲口，因為　神賜給他極多的財物。

ccb.text: 他为自己建造城邑，并且拥有大批的牛羊，因为上帝赐他极多的财富。
